title: Functions and mechanisms of protein quality control systems
further_info: Recommended Reading Tyedmers J, Mogk A, Bukau B. Cellular strategies for controlling protein aggregation, Nat Rev Mol Cell Biol 2010, 11, 777-788. Block, 6-8 weeks, full day, time to be arranged, INF 345, 10 a.m.-6 p.m.
